data_science.title: Forecasting Inflation with Microdata: An Adaptive Machine Learning Approach
data_science.why_trending: Bridges microeconomic heterogeneity and macroeconomic forecasting using adaptive ML pipelines with gradient boosted trees for inflation prediction, addressing key challenges in non-stationary environments.
topics: Adaptive machine learning for economic forecasting

data_science.title: SlimPer: Make Personalization Model Slim and Smart
data_science.why_trending: Reformulates personalized ranking for recommendation systems by exploiting task-specific structure, challenging the general-purpose transformer paradigm with practical efficiency gains.
topics: Efficient neural architectures for recommendation systems

data_science.title: Nonparametric Multi Change Point Detection for Markov Chains via Adaptive Clustering
data_science.why_trending: Establishes rigorous nonparametric guarantees for change point detection in Markovian (non-i.i.d.) data, addressing a major gap in signal processing and financial applications.
topics: Change point detection and time series analysis

data_science.title: ReDiTT: Retrieval Augmented Conditional Diffusion Transformers for Asynchronous Time Series
data_science.why_trending: Combines retrieval-augmented generation with diffusion transformers for asynchronous event prediction, advancing generative models for irregular temporal data.

data_science.title: Exploring Zero-Shot Foundation Models for Multivariate Time Series Anomaly Detection
data_science.why_trending: Investigates zero-shot application of foundation models to multivariate time series anomaly detection, bridging the gap between pretrained models and domain-specific reliability tasks.

finance.title: Reinforcement Learning for Execution under Dynamic Fees in a Closed-Loop DEX Simulator
finance.why_trending: Applies reinforcement learning to dynamic fee pricing in decentralized exchanges, closing the gap between theoretical equilibrium models and practical trader-facing fee optimization.
topics: Reinforcement learning for trading and market design

finance.title: An Extreme Value Perspective on Learning Stress Laws
finance.why_trending: Introduces Self-Similar Generative Estimation for rare-event simulation and stress testing, providing a theoretically grounded approach to tail risk measurement beyond historical samples.
topics: Extreme value theory and tail risk estimation
Generative models for financial stress testing

finance.title: When Directional Accuracy Lies: A Base-Rate-Honest Benchmark for LoRA-Adapted TimesFM on Equity Forecasting
finance.why_trending: Exposes base-rate bias in directional accuracy metrics for equity forecasting with TimesFM, establishing proper benchmarking practices for financial time series models.

finance.title: Multidimensional stochastic liquidity in Kyle's model of informed trading
finance.why_trending: Extends Kyle's market microstructure model to multidimensional stochastic liquidity, advancing theoretical understanding of informed trading under realistic market conditions.

finance.title: Deep Learning for Dynamic Programming with Recursive Utility Using First-order Conditions
finance.why_trending: Develops deep learning methods for dynamic programming with recursive utility functions, enabling practical numerical solutions to complex asset pricing problems.

social_sciences.title: First They Came for the Others: A Theory of Divide-and-Conquer
social_sciences.why_trending: Provides game-theoretic analysis of divide-and-conquer tactics through epistemic friction and inference failures, with implications for conflict, coordination, and strategic escalation.

social_sciences.title: Choice at Finite Capacity: The Bounded Agent as an Information Channel and the Recovery of Walrasian Demand
social_sciences.why_trending: Models bounded-rationality consumers as information channels, recovering Walrasian demand in the limit while explaining limited-attention behavior with a unified framework.

social_sciences.title: Shared Bidding Algorithms and Competition: Evidence from Electricity Markets
social_sciences.why_trending: Empirically demonstrates how shared third-party bidding algorithms affect competition in electricity markets, raising regulatory questions about algorithmic coordination.

social_sciences.title: Orthogonal Integrated Conditional Moment Tests for Treatment Effect Heterogeneity
social_sciences.why_trending: Proposes nonparametric tests for treatment effect heterogeneity using Neyman-orthogonal scores, advancing causal inference methodology with improved robustness to nuisance parameter estimation.

social_sciences.title: Top Trading Cycles in Large Markets: The Asymptotic Irrelevance of Priorities
social_sciences.why_trending: Shows that Top Trading Cycles loses its priority-respecting advantage in large markets, challenging foundational assumptions in mechanism design fairness.

topics.name: Adaptive machine learning for economic forecasting
topics.summary: Papers developing adaptive ML pipelines and zero-shot foundation models for forecasting inflation, anomaly detection, and time series analysis in data-scarce and non-stationary financial environments.

topics.name: Diffusion models and generative AI for domain-specific tasks
topics.summary: Applications of diffusion transformers and generative models to asynchronous time series, drug discovery, medical image classification, and tail risk simulation, advancing conditional generation under uncertainty.

topics.name: Change point detection and time series analysis
topics.summary: Nonparametric methods for detecting distributional shifts in Markovian sequences, retrieval-augmented prediction of event timing, and state transitions in financial microstructure data.

topics.name: Extreme value theory and tail risk estimation
topics.summary: Theoretical and computational frameworks for modeling rare events, stress testing, and extracting extreme-scenario probabilities using generative models and quantum topological methods.

topics.name: Market microstructure and informed trading
topics.summary: Analysis of liquidity dynamics, order-flow predictability, algorithmic trading signatures, and correlation structure recovery in financial markets under realistic conditions.

topics.name: Reinforcement learning for trading and market design
topics.summary: Deep reinforcement learning and optimal control methods for dynamic pricing, OTC market making with reputation constraints, and portfolio optimization with recursive preferences.

topics.name: Bounded rationality and information-constrained choice
topics.summary: Behavioral economics modeling of consumers and agents as limited information channels, quantum models for mental state evolution, and trade-offs between specialist blind spots and generalist flexibility.

topics.name: Causal inference and treatment effect heterogeneity
topics.summary: Nonparametric tests for heterogeneous treatment effects, temporal design methods for switchback experiments, and power analysis for honest confidence intervals in causal settings.

topics.name: Mechanism design and market allocation
topics.summary: Strategic analysis of matching markets, fairness criteria in allocation mechanisms, stability under entry, and divide-and-conquer tactics in conflict and coordination.

topics.name: Algorithmic markets and competition
topics.summary: Impact of shared algorithms on market competition, block-building microstructure in blockchain systems, and regulatory effects on stablecoin trading patterns.
